sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n25691" key="dia/rgemos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">διάργεμος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n25691.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">flecked with white,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0614.tlg001:85:15" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Babr.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">85.15</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
